name: depguard-cli
description: MCP security server for AI coding agents. Static code analysis, behavioral detection, pre-install guardian, AI hallucination guard, dead dependency detection, vulnerability audit. 10 tools. Zero dependencies.
author: Jorge Morais

scripts.check: npm run build && npm run lint && npm test && npm run audit:security

network.reason: Fetches package metadata from npm registry (registry.npmjs.org) and security advisories from GitHub Advisory Database (api.github.com). No other network access. All URLs are hardcoded constants — no dynamic URL construction.
